children.heading: Applications for biomedical and behavioral research grants, cooperative agreements, and contracts; regulations
children.label: a Applications for biomedical and behavioral research grants, cooperative agreements, and contracts; regulations
A
children.text: applications made for grants and cooperative agreements under this chapter for biomedical and behavioral research; and

children.label: B
children.text: applications made for biomedical and behavioral research and development contracts to be administered through the National Institutes of Health.

children.label: A
children.text: to the extent practical, in a manner consistent with the system for technical and scientific peer review applicable on , to grants under this chapter for biomedical and behavioral research, andNovember 20, 1985

children.label: B
children.text: to the extent practical, by technical and scientific peer review groups performing such review on or before ,November 20, 1985

children.heading: Periodic review of research at National Institutes of Health
children.label: b Periodic review of research at National Institutes of Health

children.text: the reviewing entity be provided a written description of the research to be reviewed, and
the reviewing entity provide the advisory council of the national research institute involved with such description and the results of the review by the entity,

children.heading: Compliance with requirements for inclusion of women and minorities in clinical research
children.label: c Compliance with requirements for inclusion of women and minorities in clinical research

children.text: In technical and scientific peer review under this section of proposals for clinical research, the consideration of any such proposal (including the initial consideration) shall, except as provided in paragraph (2), include an evaluation of the technical and scientific merit of the proposal regarding compliance with .section 289a–2 of this title

Paragraph (1) shall not apply to any proposal for clinical research that, pursuant to subsection (b) of , is not subject to the requirement of subsection (a) of such section regarding the inclusion of women and members of minority groups as subjects in clinical research.section 289a–2 of this title
